Operation 'createOrUpdateCase' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_side_effects, poor_ai_interpretability. Original description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'case' in the funeral domain and doesn't explain the mechanism for determining create vs. update behavior. Added domain context ('funeral case'), clarified the role of external identifiers in the decision logic, specified authentication requirements, and improved AI agent interpretability by explaining the conditional behavior and response structure.

data.current_description: Creates a new case or updates an existing one. Returns 201 when a new case is created, or 200 when an existing case is updated.
data.summary_suggestion: Create new funeral case or update existing case
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new funeral case or updates an existing case using the provided CaseRequest data. Returns HTTP 201 with the created case details when a new case is created, or HTTP 200 with updated case details when an existing case is modified. The operation uses external identifiers to determine whether to create or update. Requires authentication via HTTP Basic Auth.
data.reasoning: Original description lacks clarity about what constitutes a 'case' in the funeral domain and doesn't explain the mechanism for determining create vs. update behavior. Added domain context ('funeral case'), clarified the role of external identifiers in the decision logic, specified authentication requirements, and improved AI agent interpretability by explaining the conditional behavior and response structure.
